enemy.name: Security Drone Mark IV
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to electromagnetic pulse from the Multi-Tool

encounters.trigger: Tripping the laser grid alerts the next sector

enemy.name: Heavy Cyber-Guard
enemy.weakness: Thermal Optic Scanner reveals damaged armor plating

pickup.name: Logic Bomb
pickup.effect: A malware payload that destabilizes AI shielding

encounters.trigger: Eliminating the guard triggers a lockdown sequence leading to the main mainframe

enemy.name: Maintenance Wraith
enemy.weakness: Stunned by the Multi-Tool's overclock mode

pickup.name: Administrator Passcode
pickup.effect: Access key for the boss room

encounters.trigger: The Wraith's death forces the door to the core to open

boss.name: System Override Sentinel
boss.weakness: Requires the 'Logic Bomb' data packet to bypass its firewall
boss.victory_condition: Hack the central core while evading area-of-effect suppression fields

level.objective: Infiltrate the mega-corp mainframe and upload the virus before the facility enters terminal purge mode

pickup.name: Cloak Module
pickup.effect: Temporarily grants invisibility against surveillance drones

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the Enforcer triggers a lockdown in the mainframe.

pickup.name: Overcharge Battery
pickup.effect: Increases electrical damage against synthetic targets

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone forces the vault doors open.
Defeating the sentinel bypasses the security grid to the boss arena.

boss.name: Neon Tyrant Vex
boss.victory_condition: Disable his synaptic link using the Overcharge Battery.

level.objective: Assassinate the Neon Tyrant Vex and extract the encrypted city drive.

enemy.name: Patrol Drone
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to electromagnetic pulse from the Capacitor Rifle

encounters.trigger: Tripping the laser alarms activates the patrol

enemy.name: Cybernetic Enforcer
enemy.weakness: Overheats when hit by abilities detected by the Thermal Scanner

encounters.trigger: The Enforcer steps in to stop the player from hacking the console

enemy.name: Security Sentinel
enemy.weakness: Short-circuits if hit with the Encrypted Logic Core virus

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel detects the intrusion into the final vault, leading to the Architect AI chamber

boss.name: The Architect AI
boss.victory_condition: Inject the corruption code into the central mainframe to deactivate the lockdown.

level.objective: Infiltrate the Neo-Tokyo Server Hub and purge the corrupted AI.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone disables the gate to the data center.
The fallen enforcer reveals an encrypted access card to the server room.
Clearing the sentinel unlocks the mainframe lockdown for the boss fight.

level.objective: Infiltrate the mega-corp mainframe and reset the timeline.

enemy.name: Neon-Glitch Stalker
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to Phosphorus Flasks (Alchemist's base weapon)

encounters.hazard: Flickering holographic advertisements that obscure vision
encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the locked blast door to the cooling ducts

enemy.name: Augmented Security Drone
enemy.weakness: Damaged by the acidic residue from the Nanite Repair Sludge

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers a system override alarm leading to the mainframe

enemy.name: Corrupted Security Guard
enemy.weakness: Susceptible to the volatile Catalyst Serum vapor

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas venting from the ceiling
encounters.trigger: Eliminating the guard allows access to the Neural-Parasite Core chamber

boss.name: Neural-Parasite Core
boss.weakness: Requires the Catalytic Serum picked up in the third encounter to destabilize its circuitry
boss.victory_condition: Inject the Catalytic Serum into the exposed coolant port

level.objective: Purge the city mainframe of the Neural-Parasite infection

level.setting: A decaying, rain-slicked cyberpunk megacity sector

encounters.trigger: Opening the supply crate alerts the security drone in the ventilation shaft

enemy.name: Sentient Security Drone
enemy.weakness: Optical sensors blinded by Optical Cloak usage

encounters.hazard: Corrosive acid rain seeping through ceiling panels

pickup.name: Master Access Key
pickup.effect: Grants bypass privileges to secured terminals

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the emergency lockdown alarm, revealing the hidden passage

enemy.name: Cyber-Assassin Elite
enemy.weakness: Vulnerable to shock damage from the Monofilament Dagger's surge mod

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the Assassin unlocks the terminal leading to the Architect's Proxy

boss.name: The Architect's Proxy
boss.weakness: Vulnerable to the decryption payload installed via the 'Master Access Key'
boss.victory_condition: Disable the central server using the encryption key obtained in the third encounter

level.objective: Infiltrate the derelict skyscraper and purge the Architect's Proxy to stop the city-wide blackout
level.reward: Access to the orbital uplink and high-tier cyberware schematics

encounters.trigger: A stray bolt of lightning accidentally disables the security gate to the Data Hub
Spilling the Data-Smoothie causes the vending machine to malfunction and explode, revealing the Boss Lair
The Rubber Duck Debugger causes the mainframe to restart, initiating the final boss fight

level.objective: Retrieve the source code for the city's infinite cat video generator
level.reward: Lifetime supply of digital cat treats

level.setting: The subterranean layers of a sprawling, rain-slicked mega-city

pickup.name: Sonic Tuning Fork
pickup.effect: Allows the user to vibrate earth to shatter glass or crystalline structures

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone drops the keys to the mainframe elevator

pickup.name: Harmonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Attunes geomancy to stabilize unstable magnetic fields

encounters.trigger: Accessing the terminal unseals the path to the Core
Purifying the data stream opens the gate to the final boss

boss.name: Neon Sentinel Construct
boss.victory_condition: Stabilize the central power core using the Harmonic Resonator

level.objective: Restore the subterranean geothermic grid before the city blacks out
